abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.description: May ignore one Critical Effect per Dramatic Time.

abilities.name: Pneumatic Augmentation
abilities.description: At start of turn, may discard card to increase any Physical Aspect to 5 until next turn.

actions: (1) Rail Driver Limb (Pneumatic) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/5 damage, ignoring Armor. Crow Nailed Down: After damaging, Prone. TN 10 Athletics to stand or stay Prone, suffers 1 damage on success.
(1) Rivet Gun (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: z9 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/5 damage, ignoring Armor.
(0) Implacable Assault | Discard Twist Card to gain + to attack/damage flips this turn.
(2) Rapid Fire | Discard Twist Card for three 1 AP attacks with Ranged weapon vs single target.
system.notes: Pneumatically augmented workers loyal to Mei Feng. Earn devotion by treating injuries without repayment. Fight for current Mei Feng faction support.
